title: IQM and Zurich Instruments launch real-time quantum error correction demonstrator with NVIDIA NVQLink - IQM Quantum Computers
why:
- A real-time quantum error correction (QEC) demonstrator has been launched by integrating IQM’s superconducting quantum processor, Zurich Instruments’ ZQCS Quantum Control System, and the NVIDIA NVQLink platform.
- The project aims to deliver a scalable and fault-tolerant quantum computing system suitable for enterprise and datacenter deployment.
- The demonstrator combines a 20-qubit superconducting quantum computer, advanced quantum control electronics, and GPU-accelerated classical computing for closed-loop, low-latency decoding and feedback.
- This initiative establishes a foundation for standardized, enterprise-ready quantum systems and supports the reliable operation of logical qubits at scale.
